zh.lifeSummary: Alice Bushey是John Bushey的女兒，於1370年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾。她於1389年與Sir John Wallop在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年10月29日在英國哈普爾素坦普頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Bushey是John Bushey的女儿，于1370年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾。她于1389年与Sir John Wallop在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年10月29日在英国哈普爾素坦普頓享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bushey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bushey in Hertfordshire, so named with an Old English bysce or byxe ‘box’ + hæg ‘enclosure’.

English: alternatively, a nickname from Middle English busshi ‘bushy, shrub-like, overgrown’, probably in the sense ‘having long, thick hair’ (well recorded in 17th-century usage). These English surnames are now rare in Britain.
Americanized form of French   Boucher  . Compare   Boushey  ,   Busha   1,   Bushee  , and   Bushy  .

variants.name: Bushy
meanings: Variant of   Bushey  , a surname of French or English origin.

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bushee
meanings: Variant of   Bushey  , a surname of French or English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Bushey was born in 1370, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Bushey. She married Sir John Wallop in 1389, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 29 October 1447, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Bushey est née en 1370, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John Bushey. Elle a épousé Sir John Wallop en 1389, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1447, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato Sir John Wallop nel 1389, nel Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Busheyは1370年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアでJohn Busheyの娘として生まれた。1389年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップでSir John Wallopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年10月29日にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Bushey(은)는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 John Bushey의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 Sir John Wallop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 10월 29일 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Wallop em 1389, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Alice Bushey родилась в 1370 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John Bushey. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wallop в 1389 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 октября 1447 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
